from celery import shared_task, chain, chord
from myapp.tasks import fetch_user_data, compute_metrics


@shared_task
def aggregate_user_report(user_id):
    workflow = chord(
        [fetch_user_data.s(user_id), compute_metrics.s(user_id)],
        build_report.s(),
    )
    result = workflow.apply_async()
    return result.id


@shared_task
def build_report(results):
    user, metrics = results
    return {"user": user, "metrics": metrics}


@shared_task
def sync_order_processing(order_id):
    workflow = chain(
        validate_payment.s(order_id),
        update_inventory_on_success.s(order_id),
    )
    return workflow.apply_async()


@shared_task
def update_inventory_on_success(payment, order_id):
    if payment["status"] == "success":
        return {"order_id": order_id, "inventory": "updated"}
    return {"order_id": order_id, "error": "payment failed"}
